name: Evil Adventuring Party
description:
"The Burned Hydra" is a party of sadistic adventurers that want some fresh meat on their team to break in for some "adventurous" pursuits.

Content warning: Dubcon, Hypnosis, Futanari (just one character)

Note: Real life hyena females have pseudo penises, are matriarchal and have alpha females. Hope you learned something new today thanks to weird smut.
creator: DubConArtist
